name: ai-tools-mcp
description: Hosted-API research, local Ollama delegation, and session-management MCP server. Exposes Perplexity Sonar (quick) and Sonar Pro (deep) research, Perplexity Agent API Search-as-Code (bulk, sandboxed), Google Gemini Deep Research (async, long-form), local Ollama for sensitive/private input and mechanical text work, and conversation-session persistence. Includes slash commands, routing skills, and a session-start preflight hook.
